title: EQ - Changed custom EQ, not saved, reset device, changes are not preset [TO BE VERIFIED]
scenario: Unsaved custom EQ changes persist as a preset after device reset instead of reverting to previously saved preset values
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
Navigate to Home screen and tap on the connected [Device Name].
Select a custom EQ preset and modify some frequency bands (e.g., increase bass or treble).
Do NOT tap the Save button; instead, exit the Equalizer screen (e.g., press Back or navigate away).
Power off the Bluetooth audio device by pressing and holding the Power button.
Power on the device again by pressing the Power button.
Reconnect to the device via the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Navigate back to Audio Settings → Equalizer and observe the current EQ settings.
expected: The EQ settings should revert to the previously saved preset values (the values before the unsaved changes were made).
